_description: Tracks per-page audit state. On re-audit, only check pages whose git hash changed since last_audit_hash. Pages not listed here have never been audited — audit them fully.

audit_history.summary: Full audit: fixed configuration page (fictional), Python SDK (wrong defaults), tool schema (fictional params), plugin hooks (wrong names), beam overview (4->3 tiers), system design (fake REST API), streaming/plugin API names, version bumps across all comparison pages
